one_time_description: Carrier Sekani Tribal Council forgave $1,097,273 in comprehensive land claim negotiation (Treaty) debt owed by Stellat'en First Nation
economic_notes: Nation has two government business enterprises accounted for by modified equity method: 0987339 BC Ltd. and Stellako Custom Wood Ltd. Nation also has related entities including Slenyah Store Limited Partnership, Stellat'en Duchun Forestry Inc., Stellat'en Holdings Inc., Stellat'en Holdings LP. Portfolio investments of $2,264,049 held at CIBC Wood Gundy and Walton Investment Group LLP. COVID-19 noted as subsequent event with uncertain future impact.
notes: Fiscal year 2020 (ended March 31, 2020). Two GBEs accounted for by modified equity method: 0987339 BC Ltd. (loss of $92,833) and Stellako Custom Wood Ltd. (nil earnings). One-time item: $1,097,273 Treaty negotiation loan forgiven by Carrier Sekani Tribal Council. Significant revenue increase from Carrier Sekani Tribal Council ($2,395,048 vs $283,890 prior year). No schedule of remuneration included in the statements provided. Tangible capital assets net book value read from Schedule 1 as $12,655,240 (sum of columns: $88,475 + $12,556,367 + $99,279 + $28,769 less accumulated amortization applied, net book value per schedule = $12,655,240 approximated; actual 2020 net book value per schedule = cost $24,084,866 less accumulated amortization $11,429,413 = $12,655,453 — using $12,655,240 as stated). COVID-19 noted as subsequent event. No remuneration schedule included in document.
